basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant-II Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. or 3-year Diploma in Engineering/ Technology
qualification.details: Project Assistant-II (1.2 PA-II): B.Sc. or 3-year Diploma in Engineering/ Technology | Experience, where required, will be counted from the date after acquiring minimum educational qualification. Dissertation/ Thesis work done during academic period will not be counted as experience.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant-II (1.2 PA-II): Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Increment of 15% after 3 years of experience in the same project.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Project Assistant-II position at CSIR NEERI is July 20, 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant-II post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Project Assistant-II position is a B.Sc. degree or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering/ Technology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant-II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant-II position is 35 years. There is no mention of a minimum age limit in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant-II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant-II position will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA). An increment is also possible.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the Project Assistant-II post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant-II post will involve an online interview conducted through platforms like MS Teams or Skype.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for the position of Project Assistant-II, indicating a temporary engagement for a specific research project at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from across India apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, the job is advertised as being available "Across India," suggesting that candidates from all over the country are eligible to apply, provided they meet the other criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this CSIR NEERI Project Assistant-II recruitment is RECRUIT_RC_1C_Delhi_13072026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the project for which this recruitment is being done?
faq.answer: The project is tenable at CSIR-NEERI Delhi Regional Centre, although the institute's main city is listed as Nagpur.
